2026-04-08T19:31:47.9007369Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-08T19:31:47.9007781Z 
2026-04-08T19:31:47.9008049Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-08T19:31:47.9008703Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-08T19:31:47.9009073Z 
2026-04-08T19:31:47.9009224Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-08T19:31:47.9009467Z

2026-04-08T19:31:47.9009824Z

Use with pagination parameters to control the number of results returned.\n 5. get_review_comments - Get review threads on a pull request. Each thread contains logically grouped review comments made on the same code location during pull request reviews. Returns threads with metadata (isResolved, isOutdated, isCollapsed) and their associated comments. Use cursor-based pagination (perPage, after) to control results.\n 6. get_reviews - Get the reviews on a pull request. 2026-04-08T19:33:17.1037556Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-08T19:33:17.1037764Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-04-08T19:33:17.1038089Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-04-08T19:33:17.1038206Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-04-08T19:33:17.1038344Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-04-08T19:33:17.1038434Z [36;1melse[0m

2026-04-08T19:33:17.1038693Z [36;1mfi[0m
